description: Style NoteDeveloped by perfumer Oliver Cresp and Jacques Cavallier, Nina by nina ricci is a coming together of contrasting emotions - innocence and seduction. A fresh and magical fragrance with citrus accents, it presents a delicious mix of fresh lemon, lime, moonflower, peony, red toffee apple, praline and vanilla. Applewood, cedarwood and musk bring up a sultry base as the drydown to this enticing and magical mixture. In a stunning red apple bottle, it is designed to take you to the enchanting world of fairy tales.Quantity: 80 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
